entity.summary: Decentralized exchange and trading platform on the XRP Ledger providing token trading, swaps, pools, token launches, and related asset-management tools.
entity.notes: Current first-party website explicitly describes First Ledger as a decentralized exchange built on the XRP Ledger. First-party documentation provides current trading, wallet, pool, fee, token-launch, and account-setup guides.

evidence.title: First Ledger official trading platform
evidence.notes: Current first-party platform identifies First Ledger as an XRPL decentralized exchange and exposes trading, token, pool, launch, and leaderboard functions.

evidence.title: What is First Ledger?
evidence.notes: First-party documentation describes First Ledger as a fast way to trade on XRPL and includes current buying, selling, pool, wallet, fee, and token-launch documentation.

evidence.title: First Ledger exchange discovery entry
evidence.notes: Secondary exchange registry corroborates First Ledger as an exchange venue; first-party XRPL DEX documentation remains the classification authority.
